payload.answer: There is a conflict: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: Replace the existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
Keep the existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
Keep both facts separately because both may be true in your context.
Store the new statement as ambiguous/unresolved until you clarify Sara’s relationship.
Treat the new input as a correction of the existing relationship.
